brief: US news highlights political controversies, food safety scares, and wildfires, while research examines writing dynamics and AI's role in communication.
news_summary: Trump's election demands spark Democratic backlash, a lettuce recall over cyclospora affects Taco Bell, and wildfires rage in Oregon. Other stories include Paul Pelosi's hit-and-run charge, ICE-related violence, and North Korean K-pop exposure.
papers_summary: Studies explore how biography shapes writing instructors' identities, children's multimodal composition, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statements. Other papers analyze urban driving data and human-robot juggling.

en.brief: US news highlights political controversies, food safety scares, and wildfires, while research examines writing dynamics and AI's role in communication.
en.news_summary: Trump's election demands spark Democratic backlash, a lettuce recall over cyclospora affects Taco Bell, and wildfires rage in Oregon. Other stories include Paul Pelosi's hit-and-run charge, ICE-related violence, and North Korean K-pop exposure.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore how biography shapes writing instructors' identities, children's multimodal composition, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statements. Other papers analyze urban driving data and human-robot juggling.

zh.brief: 英国新任首相贝安德就职，中英关系或迎务实转向；习近平首现世界AI大会凸显中国开源战略；美国收紧学生签证，特朗普再提中国干预选举。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德正式就任英国工党党魁并即将成为首相，其对华政策受关注；习近平出席世界人工智能大会强调开源策略；美国拟收紧外国学生签证，特朗普指控中国干预选举遭反驳。
zh.papers_summary: 英文论文聚焦二语写作教学、ChatGPT对写作的影响、多模态可视化理解及AI编码安全等议题，中文论文无新增。

todays_image.caption: A fire hose section controls a powerful flow that can cause damage if unregulated, mirroring the need for America to release secrets with precision rather than in a damaging deluge.
todays_image.title: Fire Hose Section
